summary: Iteration 20: PlanningPage Refactoring and Bug Fixes Testing - All features verified working. PlanningPage successfully refactored from 2571 to 1242 lines. NewAppointmentDialog and EditAppointmentDialog extracted as separate components and working correctly. Bug fixes verified: 1) Abbonamenti visible at top of public booking modal with 6 items, 2) Services sorted by sort_order (services without sort_order appear first due to MongoDB null sorting), 3) Backend auto-assigns free operator when no preference given.

minor.issue: Services without sort_order field appear first due to MongoDB null sorting behavior. 4 services missing sort_order field.

passed_tests: REFACTORING TESTS:
1. PlanningPage (/planning) loads correctly after refactoring - PASS
2. NewAppointmentDialog opens via 'Nuovo' button - PASS
3. NewAppointmentDialog shows: Date, Client (Occasionale/Nuovo), Orario, Operatore, Services accordion, Promozioni (7), Abbonamenti & Card (6), Notes, Save button - PASS
4. EditAppointmentDialog opens when clicking appointment - PASS
5. EditAppointmentDialog shows: Client info, Loyalty points with Aggiungi/Rimuovi/Azzera, Date/Time/Operator, Services, Notes, Totale, Elimina/Annulla/Salva/INCASSA buttons - PASS
6. Checkout flow works: INCASSA button opens checkout mode with payment methods (Contanti, Abbonamento/Prepagata), Promozioni Disponibili - PASS
7. Recurring appointment dialog works: Shows repeat options (Settimane/Mesi), count, preview of appointments to create - PASS
8. Week view and Month view work correctly - PASS
BUG FIX TESTS:
9. Public booking modal (/prenota-ora) shows Abbonamenti accordion at TOP with 6 items - PASS
10. Promozioni accordion shows 7 items below Abbonamenti - PASS
11. Services in public booking modal sorted by sort_order (ascending) - PASS (for services with sort_order)
12. POST /api/public/booking with no operator_id auto-assigns free operator - PASS
13. Backend returns available_operators and alternative_slots on conflict - PASS
BACKEND API TESTS (7/9 passed):
14. /api/public/website returns card_templates array - PASS
15. /api/public/booking accepts promo_id field - PASS
16. /api/public/booking accepts card_template_id field - PASS
17. /api/public/busy-slots returns operator info - PASS
18. /api/public/operators returns 2 operators (BRUNO, MBHS) - PASS
failed_tests: Services sort_order test - 4 services missing sort_order field (ondulazione/permanente, anticrespo/stiratura classica, extra capelli lunghi, extra cap.lunghi)
action_items: OPTIONAL: Add sort_order field to 4 legacy services that are missing it (ondulazione/permanente, anticrespo/stiratura classica, extra capelli lunghi, extra cap.lunghi)
critical_code_review_comments: PlanningPage.jsx correctly imports and uses NewAppointmentDialog and EditAppointmentDialog components (lines 29-30)
NewAppointmentDialog.jsx (534 lines) properly handles client selection, services, promos, card templates
EditAppointmentDialog.jsx (623 lines) properly handles edit, checkout, loyalty points management
BookingModal.jsx correctly shows Abbonamenti accordion at top (lines 361-434) with purple color scheme
Backend public.py correctly auto-assigns free operator when no preference given (lines 223-227)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20 verified: PlanningPage refactoring complete and working. NewAppointmentDialog and EditAppointmentDialog are separate components at /app/frontend/src/components/planning/. All dialogs work correctly including checkout flow, recurring appointments, loyalty points management. Public booking modal shows Abbonamenti at top with 6 items. Backend auto-assigns free operator. Minor issue: 4 legacy services missing sort_order field.

refactoring.checkout_flow: Payment methods, promos, loyalty points all working

bug_fixes.abbonamenti_at_top: VERIFIED - Shows at top of public booking modal with 6 items
bug_fixes.services_sort_order: VERIFIED - Services sorted ascending (4 legacy services missing field)
bug_fixes.auto_assign_operator: VERIFIED - Backend assigns free operator when no preference
